description: Composition Blue round neck kurta made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, pleated ruffles at the neck, keyhole neckline at the back with a button closure, pin tucks at the neck that flare out at the waist and increasing intensity of colour from the neck to hem Fit Regular Wash care Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Dry inside out in shade Hot iron This kurta by w is designed to accentuate your femininity. Look stylish in this classic piece and revel in the comfort of the soft fabric. Pair it with leggings and heels for a formal look. You can also wear it with denims and matching ballerina shoes for a casual look. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
